purpose: Machine-readable WellFit PR Diff Review Report policy. It applies existing PR Review Agent governance to actual changed files or PR diffs before merge consideration, classifies changed files, detects protected paths/topics, reports cross-reference/readiness/inventory/task-status impact, and summarizes auto-merge, auto-repair, and post-creation guard outcomes without approving, merging, repairing, deploying, or modifying product runtime code.

changedFileClassificationRules.meaning: Documentation, TODO, architecture, handoff, or agent instruction changes that do not modify product runtime code.
Machine-readable governance, readiness, inventory, route/API, feature, memory, or policy register changes.
WellFit development-agent script, runbook, schema, or report-generation changes.
Next.js app routes, layouts, route handlers, metadata, or runtime app shell.
Runtime domain, client, server, Firebase, economy, mission, Buddy, or utility libraries.
Firebase Functions backend source, configuration, tests, or build inputs.
Public static assets exposed by the web app.
Dependency manifests, lockfiles, Firebase project configuration, or script definitions.
GitHub Actions, PR automation, issue templates, or repository workflow configuration.
Native Unity/AR assets or WellFitBuddyAR work, including PR #13-sensitive paths.
Any path not matched by a more specific rule; requires human review and Work Map/inventory consideration.

protectedPathRules.reason: Runtime Next.js app code requires explicit review; this framework must not modify it.
Runtime UI components require explicit review; this framework must not modify them.
Runtime domain/client/server libraries require explicit review; this framework must not modify them.
Firebase Functions/backend logic requires explicit review; this framework must not modify it.
Security/compliance rules require explicit review; this framework must not modify them.
Public assets can affect visible product output and require explicit review.
Root scripts/dependencies can alter runtime/build behavior and require explicit review.
Root dependency lockfile changes require explicit review.
Firebase project configuration can alter deployment/runtime behavior and requires explicit review.
Repository workflow automation can affect checks or merges and requires explicit review.
Unity AR work is protected; do not delete, overwrite, merge, close, or depend on old PR #13.
Unity paths require explicit review and must stay isolated from web beta governance work.
PR #13 and Unity work must not be merged, closed, overwritten, or used as a shortcut by this framework.

crossReferenceImpactRules.requiredAction: Compare changed files with project-register/cross-reference-maintenance.json changeCategories and report likely required inspect/update targets. Do not auto-update files from the report script.
Report agent_script_added_or_changed and quality_gate_changed cross-reference considerations when a WellFit dev-agent script or quality gate changes.
Report that human review is expected before merge and that Work Map, TODO Index, readiness, route/API, inventory, and protected-area evidence may be required.

productReadinessImpactRules.requiredAction: Report likely product-readiness impact and require either product-readiness update evidence or a no-update rationale.
Report whether changed governance/docs alter module readiness, blockers, next safe tasks, or protected status.

repositoryInventoryImpactRules.requiredAction: Report unmapped/unknown file coverage risk and require repository-inventory triage before merge consideration.
Report whether each changed path is already mapped in project-register/repository-inventory.json and whether inventory updates appear likely.

taskStatusImpactRules.requiredAction: Report that task-status/work-log evidence is expected for governance/documentation/script tasks and that historical TODO/status context must be preserved.
Report that task-status/work-log evidence plus human review is expected for runtime, protected, Unity, or unknown changes.

autoMergeReportRules.requiredSummary: Include AUTO_MERGE_ELIGIBLE=true/false when available, but never treat it as approval or perform a merge.

autoRepairReportRules.requiredSummary: Include AUTO_REPAIR_ALLOWED=true/false when available, but never repair files, retry writes, or bypass human review.

postCreationGuardReportRules.requiredSummary: Include PR_POST_CREATION_GUARD_READY=true/false when available and report mergeability/check-status evidence after PR creation without approving or merging.

humanReviewRequiredFor: any protected topic match outside explicit governance/reporting text
any Product Readiness status advancement or production-readiness claim
any repository-inventory unmapped file or unknown coverage impact
any cross-reference impact that suggests missing required targets
any auto-merge, auto-repair, deploy, approval, PR close, or PR #13 action
